column1: Define a vector in ML context;"ordered list of numbers"
Difference between * and @ in numpy;"* is element-wise; @ is matrix multiplication"
What is broadcasting?;"numpy auto-expanding smaller arrays to match larger array shape during ops"
What's the geometric meaning of dot product?;Measures alignment between two vectors. Large positive = same direction:0 = perpendicular:negative = opposite
numpy broadcasting rule (one sentence);Smaller array is stretched along axes of size 1 to match the larger array's shape
What is MSE ?;The average of square of the residuals
What is residual?;difference of the actual values and predicted values
